security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:*

bundle.shortDescription: Generate images and video on your own GPU.
bundle.longDescription: Darkroom generates images and video with AI models running entirely on your own GPU, via a bundled ComfyUI engine. No cloud, no account, no upload.
